author: y4rr
content: Result: C9.1 nn layers conformance suite delivered. Files created: ferrotorch-nn/tests/conformance_nn_layers.rs (153 tests, 153/153 pass), ferrotorch-nn/tests/conformance/_surface_inventory.toml (518 items, full crate), ferrotorch-nn/tests/conformance/_surface_exclusions.toml (168 exclusions with reasons), ferrotorch-nn/tests/conformance/fixtures.json (30 fixtures, regenerated from torch 2.6 on installed env), scripts/regenerate_nn_layers_fixtures.py (exits 0). 11 modules covered: linear, conv, lazy_linear, lazy_conv, lazy_conv_transpose, embedding, identity, padding, upsample, pooling, dropout. Cascade bugs: #902 (attention API drift), #903 (structural clippy). Clippy clean on our files; pre-existing failures in conformance_nn_attention and conformance_nn_structural are unrelated to C9.1.
